title: LittleBuilders
description: A modpack for building with LittleTiles.
body: The perfect modpack to build stuff with LittleTiles in 1.12.2. It is the official modpack by Team CREATIVE. It is used for building contests. **Mods included:** * ALET * Chisel * JEI * CTM * CreativeCore * LittleTiles * Kiro's Basic Blocks * World Edit
